positive: A stylized, highly contrasting silhouette of a mountain landscape bathed in a vibrant, ethereal sunrise. The scene features geometric peaks, winding river forms, and stylized flora arranged in a symmetrical, centralized composition. Use a limited, deep color palette of indigo, warm orange, and crisp white. The style should evoke minimalist woodcut art meets contemporary digital illustration, suitable for direct placement on apparel. The composition must be clean, crisp, and easily printable, with distinct outlines and solid color blocking. Cinematic lighting, high contrast, detailed texture, symmetrical composition, clean lines.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, low detail, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, writing, logo, signature, photorealistic, messy, sketch, painting, gradient, smoke, messy outlines, cluttered background
